essence: Assists roofers by preparing materials, handling tools, and performing basic roofing tasks under supervision.

identity.title: Roofing Labourer
identity.summary: Supports roofing teams with material handling, site preparation, and basic installation tasks while learning trade skills.

salary.notes: Progression to qualified roofer increases earnings significantly.

qualifications: Experience on construction sites or in manual trades
Willingness to work at height and follow safety procedures
Basic tool handling and teamwork skills

lifestyle.description: Physically demanding outdoor work with exposure to weather and early starts; apprenticeship pathways common.

habits: Assists with lifting and positioning roofing materials
Maintains tools and cleans work areas
